member.summary: Represents the main application shell.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified connect popup.

member.name: T:MissionPlanner.WinUI.App
member.summary: Provides application-specific behavior to supplement the default Application class.

member.name: M:MissionPlanner.WinUI.App.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the singleton application object. This is the first line of authored code executed, and as such is the logical equivalent of main() or WinMain().

member.summary: InitializeComponent()

member.summary: Data for the connect popup, such as available connection types, ports, and baud rates.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified application state.

member.name: T:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationConfigurator
member.summary: Configures the application services and options.

member.summary: Adds the application configuration to the service collection.
member.param: The configuration.

member.name: T:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions
member.summary: Represents the configuration options for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions.SectionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the configuration section for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the configured port for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions.BaudRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the configured baud rate for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions.ConnectionType
member.summary: Gets or sets the configured connection type for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationOptions.Template
member.summary: Gets the template for the application configuration.

member.name: T:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationState
member.summary: Represents the state of the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationState.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the application is connected.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationState.SelectedPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected port for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationState.SelectedBaudRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected baud rate for the application.

member.name: P:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationState.SelectedConnectionType
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected connection type for the application.

member.name: T:MissionPlanner.Configuration.ApplicationStateService
member.summary: Singleton service for managing shared application state across the application.

member.summary: Initializes the service with values from ApplicationState.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
